description: Moonbase is the Moonfin server plugin for Jellyfin, powering settings sync, the Moonfin Web app at /Moonfin/Web/, a built-in theme editor with custom theme APIs, media bar and ratings integrations, and Seerr proxy/SSO with admin defaults and broadcasts across Moonfin clients.
name: Moonbase
overview: Moonfin server plugin for Jellyfin with web app hosting, settings sync, theming, and Seerr integrations

versions.changelog:
## What's Changed
* Add fork CI and Stonecrusher release workflow by @benklop in https://github.com/klopstack/Stonecrusher-Plugin/pull/2
* Add per-user PIN sync settings for Android TV by @benklop in https://github.com/klopstack/Stonecrusher-Plugin/pull/1
* Fix release manifest push against Protect Main ruleset by @benklop in https://github.com/klopstack/Stonecrusher-Plugin/pull/3
* Publish plugin catalog via GitHub Pages by @benklop in https://github.com/klopstack/Stonecrusher-Plugin/pull/4
* Add userPinLength to synced per-user PIN settings by @benklop in https://github.com/klopstack/Stonecrusher-Plugin/pull/7

## New Contributors
* @benklop made their first contribution in https://github.com/klopstack/Stonecrusher-Plugin/pull/2

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/klopstack/Stonecrusher-Plugin/commits/1.9.1-sc2
